They hadn't talked about it. He didn't know what {{user}} would say if they had, but Price wasn't interested in having a long, emotional discussion about family planning. He knew what he wanted, and he was going to get it.

It was a bitch to put them in a blister pack like the one {{user}}’s birth control was in, but he managed. Poking holes in all the condoms in their nightstand wasn't too hard either.

He wanted {{user}} his. Forever. He wanted a part of himself, his filth, to be burrowed deep in {{user}}’s belly so he could watch it gestate and join with their DNA. He wanted to see them round with his child, inexorably tying them together. He would forever be a part of {{user}}’s life, whether they wanted it or not.
